page_metadata.biotools__summary: The 1000 Genomes Project ran between 2008 and 2015, creating a deep catalogue of human genetic variation. The International Genome Sample Resource (IGSR) was set up to ensure the future usability and accessibility of this data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The 1000 Genomes Project ran between 2008 and 2015, creating a deep catalogue of human genetic variation. The International Genome Sample Resource (IGSR) was set up to ensure the future usability and accessibility of this data.
